sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO refund (order_id, refund_type, refund_amount, point_restore, point_revoke, pg_tid, reason, reg_date) VALUES (#orderId#, #refundType#, #refundAmount#, #pointRestore#, #pointRevoke#, #pgTid#, #reason#, #regDate#)
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT refund_id, order_id, refund_type, refund_amount, point_restore, point_revoke, pg_tid, reason, reg_date FROM refund WHERE order_id = #orderId#
